name: default_v1
description: Curated 49 anatomical landmarks in the Allen Mouse Brain CCFv3, stored in Neuroglancer (x, y, z) µm coordinates as used by Allen's precomputed source gs://allen_neuroglancer_ccf/average_template_10_8bit. Source_convention 'allen_xyz_no_flip' = identity mapping (numpy z=x, numpy y=y, numpy x=z) — verified empirically; despite BrainGlobe reporting orientation 'asr', the loaded array's voxel order matches Allen's native NRRD storage and no axis flips are needed. Coordinates are physical µm and work identically across allen_mouse_10/25/50/100 µm (same physical frame).
